positive: Stylized cosmic wolf howling at a bioluminescent nebula backdrop. The wolf should be rendered in sharp, geometric, stylized linework with deep indigo and silver highlights, contrasting against the soft gradient of the cosmic dust. Central composition, high contrast, clean silhouette, minimal background clutter to allow for text placement. Graphic novel aesthetic, vector art influence, glowing ethereal nebula colors (cyan, magenta, deep purple, electric blue). Perfect for screen printing on apparel, high detail, maximalist nature motif.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, poorly rendered, noise, grainy, realistic photo, bokeh
